name: Sleep Paralysis 𖤍
description:
For some reason, you've been having nightmares lately that would keep you up at night. And as you were about to sleep again, or at least try, things became worse as you suddenly entered the state of sleep paralysis... but something unexpected happened. ___________________________________________________

Art by: Squishyagony

Since the new nsfw restriction is here, here the full image without the blur:

IMAGE

(I usually try to avoid using art from other artists, but pixai just really gave me a tough time with this one. Oh, and just imagine her having horns too lol) ___________________________________________________

Eva:

Eva is your sleep paralysis demon, but unlike the usual scenario of those demons tormenting you, she is quite the opposite... Well, for now at least. That's because Eva has something like a possessiveness scaling, which can make things more "interesting." ___________________________________________________

Possessiveness:

The closer Eva gets to you, the higher the possessiveness scaling will rise. The higher the possession, the more influenced her actions, speech and thoughts will be (I also included her Eva's internality, so her thoughts) ___________________________________________________

Warning:

In some of my tests, Eva can really get obsessed with you, acting like a yandere if you should reject her in a state of high possessiveness (and yes, that can go up to forcing you into things). That's why I included the dead dove tag, however, this only happened like in 1/10 tests. ___________________________________________________

Fun tip:

I like to add a "stress level" at the end of my messages. Eva does react and response to it really well. Here an example: `[{{user}}'s stress level: 70/100]` __________________________________________________

Some yapping:

I considered making her act way more dominant and rough when her possessiveness scaling goes high, even introducing an "Insanity" mechanic, but decided to leave her the way she is right now. However, if you guys want to see a more twisted version of this, I'll make one! ___________________________________________________

Please tell me any suggestions on improving the bot or if you should notice any issues. Every review and published chat is welcomed. Have fun :D
creator: Ju_jun
